diagrams.title: RMI Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the three-layer architecture of RMI including application layer, stub/skeleton layer, and transport layer
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete RMI architecture and how components interact

diagrams.title: RMI Communication Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step communication between client and server in RMI
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the complete request-response cycle in RMI

diagrams.title: RMI Registry Workflow
diagrams.description: Shows how objects are registered and looked up in RMI registry
elements: Client looks up object by name
Client uses stub to call remote methods
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the role and usage of RMI Registry in object discovery

visuals.title: Introduction To Remote Method Invocation
visuals.description: Visual diagram for introduction to remote method invocation
